Applying to 10001101
Input
0 1
1 0
2 0
3 0

7 1
Output
0 XNOR24 = XNOR(0,1) = 0
1 XNOR35 = XNOR(0,1) = 0
2 XNOR46 = XNOR(1,0) = 0
3 XNOR57OR0 = OR(XNOR(1,1),1) = 1

\boxed{00011001}
